name: adana-dsa
description: Adana deal-sourcing agent — runs CoStar / Reonomy saved searches and LexisNexis contact enrichment under Adana's own logins, persisting everything through the Adana gateway MCP.

gateway_api_key.description: Adana gateway API key (adana_live_… — generated in the gateway dashboard, Settings → API keys). Passed as gateway_api_key on every adana_* tool call.
